title: Supabase Schema Sync Check

transitions.note: Add pg-based schema sync check for Supabase tables/columns.
typecheck, lint, build, docs:check passed. schema:check exits 2 here (no SUPABASE_DB_URL); run against the real DB to validate schema.
Fixed script runtime by keeping package.json unchanged and making scripts/check-schema-sync.ts directly runnable by Node; added models.status migration.
Schema sync check finalized and clean migrations verified

notes: schema:check now runs via plain CommonJS-compatible code in scripts/check-schema-sync.ts on the project-supported Node >=20.9 runtime. models.status drift is resolved by migration 20260610061249_add_models_status_column.sql, which adds a generated status column derived from is_active. schema:check still requires SUPABASE_DB_URL + network to validate the real Supabase DB and must not print secrets.
